title: HR onboarding email
entities: person name, employee badge id, start date, work email
text:
Hi team,

Please welcome Priya Natarajan, joining the platform group on 2026-08-03. Her badge (A-99417) is ready at reception and her address priya.n@corp.example has been provisioned.

Thanks,
Onboarding

title: Invoice

title: Encyclopedic prose (tests attribute semantics)
entities: company name, country name, person name, date
text: Kura Sushi USA, Inc. operates technology-enabled restaurants throughout the United States. Established in 2008 with its main office in Irvine, California, the company was formerly known as Kula Sushi USA, Inc. Its regional director, Alan Mori, joined on 2019-04-01.

title: JSON session record
entities: customer id, session timestamp, ipv4, card number

title: Meeting transcript snippet
entities: person name, company name, phone number, date
text:
[00:04:12] Dana: I'll loop in Marcus Webb from Corex Systems before Friday.
[00:04:19] Priya: Works. He can reach me at 646-555-0134.
[00:04:27] Dana: Great, targeting 2026-07-25 for the follow-up.

title: Customer support chat

title: Layoff memo (try free-form topics!)
entities: person name, department, date, severance amount
text:
Confidential — HR only.
Effective 2026-09-01, the platform-tools department will be reduced by four roles. Kai Brandt's severance package totals $84,500 per the schedule reviewed on Thursday.
Do not distribute.
